diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,149 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports {Hono}, {Context}, {HonoRequest}, type aliases {Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions}
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (imported from ./hono), Context (exported/imported), HonoRequest (imported as type), type re-exports from ./types and ./client
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Barrel export module that re-exports everything from src/hono as the main entry point, plus types and type aliases for context, request, and client.
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines total. Acts as primary public entry. Re-exports Hono class from ./hono and type aliases from ./context, ./request, and ./client using export/export type.
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: exports types {Bindings, Variables, BlankEnv, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute, HandlerResponse, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface}
+- Internal names noticed: IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergeSchemaPath, MergePath, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, Response, TypedResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context (for Context), ./hono-base (for HonoBase), ./utils/headers (for CustomHeader, RequestHeader), ./utils/types, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for Hono. Defines Env/Variables/Bindings, Input, various Handler types (Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H), HandlerInterface with overloads for get/post/put/delete/on/use with 1-10 handlers, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, and OnHandlerInterface.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~1450+ lines. Extensive type system. Defines core route handler types with variadic overloads for chaining handlers (1 through 10). Imports from ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/types, ./router.
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: exports class {Hono}
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions (imported from ./hono-base), SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Entry class for core Hono framework. Extends HonoBase. Constructor sets router to SmartRouter by default (using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter). Takes optional options for strict, custom router, and getPath.
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines. Simple class that extends HonoBase and wires up default router.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: class Hono with methods {get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use}, methods {route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire}
+- Internal names noticed: compose (imported), Context (imported), HonoOptions, Router (imported type), Env, H, methods _addRoute, _handleError, _dispatch, private _basePath, private router, #notFoundHandler, private errorHandler, private _basePath, private #path
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants (COMPOSED_HANDLER), ./utils/url (getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath)
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class implementation. Defines app.{get,post,put,delete,options,patch,all,on,use} methods. Handles routing via router.add(). Implements request processing via _dispatch(). Uses compose for middleware. Exposes fetch, request, mount, route, basePath, onError, notFound, fire.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~545 lines. Core runtime logic. Implements app method chaining, route registration, request dispatch, error/not-found handling, and various convenience methods. Uses typed private fields and # symbols for fields not exposing at runtime.
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: class {Context}, exports {Data, ExecutionContext, Renderer, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, TEXT_PLAIN}
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest (imported), Result (imported type), Env, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, ResponseHeader, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, BaseMime, InvalidJSONValue, IsJSONValue, JSONParsed, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, SetHeadersOptions, ResponseOrInit, setDefaultContentType, createResponseInstance, setDefaultContentType
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/headers, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Request context class. Wraps a Request and stores env, vars, response, status, execution context, layout, renderer, and not-found handler. Provides get.req (HonoRequest), get.event, get.executionCtx, get.res, set.res, render, setLayout, getLayout, setRenderer, header, status, set, get, var, newResponse, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound.
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines. Provides c.get(), c.set(), c.header(), c.status(), c.var, c.json(), c.text(), c.body(), c.html(), c.redirect(), c.notFound(), c.req, etc. Extensively typed interfaces for typed responses.
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: class {HonoRequest}, exports {cloneRawRequest}, symbols GET_MATCH_RESULT, methods {param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, blob, formData, valid, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath}
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException (imported), HonoRequest class, Result (imported type), Input, InputToDataByTarget, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, RouterRoute, ValidationTargets, Body, BodyCache, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, parseBody, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, decodeURIComponent_
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./router (Result, GET_MATCH_RESULT), ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper class. Extends standard Request. Exposes .url, .method, .param(), .query(), .queries(), .header(), .parseBody(), .json(), .text(), .arrayBuffer(), .blob(), .formData(), .valid(), .matchedRoutes, .routePath. Includes body caching to allow body cloning after first read. Includes cloneRawRequest utility to clone request if body was consumed.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~505 lines. Provides request parsing, parameter extraction, body parsing methods, and route matching info.
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: exports symbol {GET_MATCH_RESULT}
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT (unique symbol)
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single export of a unique symbol GET_MATCH_RESULT used as type for matchResult getter on HonoRequest.
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line. Constant symbol export.
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: exports {parseBody}, types {BodyData, ParseBodyOptions}
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest (imported), BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request (HonoRequest)
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility. Exports parseBody function and types BodyData and ParseBodyOptions. parseBody checks Content-Type and calls parseFormData for form-encoded or multipart, or returns {} for other types. parseFormData converts FormData to nested object. Supports .dot (nested objects via dot notation) and .all (arrays for multi-value fields).
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines. Parses multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded body content. Supports dot notation for nesting and array values for repeated fields.
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: exports {compose}, types {Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler}
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch (local inner function), index (closure variable)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context (Context type), ./types (Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler)
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility. Imports koa-compose-like pattern. Returns a function(context, next) => context that chains middleware. Throws error if next() called multiple times. Calls errorHandler if error occurs, onNotFound if no route matched. Sets context.res when middleware returns a response or context is not finalized.
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines. Composes middleware array into single dispatchable function. Manages handler index, error propagation, and not-found fallback.
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: exports class {HTTPException}, type HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode (imported type), res, message, cause
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/headers
+- Plain-English summary: HTTPException class extends Error. Takes status code (defaults to 500) and options (message, res, cause). Constructor calls Error constructor. getResponse() returns or creates a Response.
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines. Class for throwing errors with specific HTTP status codes. Can provide custom response or default error response.
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports {hc}, exports {parseResponse, DetailedError}, types {InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode}
+- Internal names noticed: client module exports, utils exports
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client module entry point. Exports hc (HTTP client factory), parseResponse and DetailedError from ./client/utils. Re-exports types from ./client.
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines. Barrel export for client functionality.
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: exports {hc}, class {ClientRequestImpl}
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy (local function), ClientRequestImpl class, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, UnionToIntersection, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, Client, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono (types), ../types, ../utils/cookie (serialize), ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client via hc(). createProxy returns a Proxy that calls callback with path and args. ClientRequestImpl holds url, method, buildSearchParams, query params, path params, rBody, cType. fetch() constructs url, sets headers/body, calls fetch. hc() returns typed proxy over client API.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~223 lines. Implements hc() as proxy-based HTTP client. ClientRequestImpl builds requests with URL params, query strings, body. Supports GET/POST/etc.
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: exports {fetchRP}, class {DetailedError}
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses set, detectResponseType function, jsonRegex regex, DetailedError class
+- Imports or neighbors: none (standalone utility)
+- Plain-English summary: Parses fetch Response. If body exists and status not in nullBodyResponses (101, 204, 205, 304), detects content-type json vs text and calls json() or text(). If !response.ok throws DetailedError with statusCode and detail. DetailedError extends Error with optional detail, code, log, statusCode.
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines. Minimal fetch response parser. Detects response type from content-type, extracts body, throws structured error on non-ok status. Not Hono-imported.
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: types {BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, TypedURL, Response, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Client}
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (imported types), HonoBase, Methods, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, Schema, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, HasAllKeys, UnionToIntersection, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, BuildSearch, BuildPathname, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, ObjectType, PickRoute, PickSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/headers
+- Plain-English summary: Client type definitions. Methods: $get | $post | $put | $delete | $options | $patch | $all. ExpandAllMethod creates types from $all to all methods. ClientRequest is proxy-based method calls. fetch returns Promise<ClientResponse>. ClientResponse has body, ok, status, headers, url, json, text, blob, formData, arrayBuffer, redirect, clone. Complex type system for typed URL generation, path parameter replacement, query string building, status code filtering, schema extraction.
+- Copy-safe detail: ~393 lines. Type-level HTTP client with typed URLs, responses, requests, and methods. Complex conditional types for dynamic path generation.
+
+## src/utils/types
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: exports {parseResponse, DetailedError}, functions {mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge}
+- Internal names noticed: status code imports, isObject, fetchRP (imported)
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/headers, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client client-side utility functions. mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams (URLSearchParams), replaceUrlProtocol (ws/http), removeIndexString, deepMerge, isObject. exports {parseResponse, DetailedError} from ./client/fetch-result-please.
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines. Utility functions typed for client use. mergePath, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlParam etc plus fetchRP export.
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: exports {fire}, function {fire}
+- Internal names noticed: app, options, HandleOptions, handler import, addEventListener
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono (Hono type), ../../types (Env, Schema), ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter for Hono. fire() registers Hono app with addEventListener('fetch', handle(app, options)). Calls handle(app, options) which returns FetchEvent handler that sets up respondWith for app.fetch.
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines. Makes Hono app work in Service Worker context via
